name: IRC_AI_DISMISSED_RECOMS
description: Table used for tracking dismissed candidates from AI recommendations. The dismissed candidates will not be recommended for that requisition

columns.Name: AI_DISMISSED_RECOMS_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier for the dismissed Recommendation, System generated value

columns.Name: AI_RECOMS_CONTEXT_CODE
columns.Comments: Context from where the recommendation is dismissed

columns.Name: DISMISSED_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Reference Id for the dismissed entity Ex: Candidate Person Id

columns.Name: SOURCE_ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Represents Source Entity type from where the recommendation is dismissed Ex: Requisition

columns.Name: SOURCE_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Reference Id for the source entity. Ex: Requisition id

columns.Name: REQUESTOR_ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Requestor entity type , who is dismissing the recommendation. Possible values are PERSON , REQUISITION

columns.Name: REQUESTOR_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Person Id of the logged in user who has dismissed the candidate

columns.Name: REASON_CODE
columns.Comments: Dismissed reason. References to lookup code ORA_AI_DISMISS_RECOMS_REASON for dismissed reason

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
